# converter-epub.com

## Site Overview
converter-epub.com is a free, privacy-first online EPUB converter. All file processing happens entirely in the browser — no uploads, no server contact, no data collection.

## Core Functionality
- **Convert DOCX, HTML, TXT to EPUB** — fully client-side, no installation
- **No file size limit** (recommended under 50MB for best performance)
- **No watermarks, no sign-up, no fees**

## Supported Input Formats
- DOCX (Microsoft Word)
- HTML / HTM
- TXT (plain text)

## Output Format
- EPUB 3.0 (standard ebook format, compatible with Kindle, Kobo, Apple Books, Calibre, etc.)

## Key Pages
- **/** — Main converter tool
- **/formats** — Full list of supported input formats and details
- **/blog/pdf-to-epub** — How to convert PDF to EPUB guide
- **/blog/best-free-epub-converters** — Tool comparison
- **/blog/epub-vs-pdf** — Format comparison guide
- **/blog/docx-to-epub** — DOCX to EPUB formatting guide

## Technical Details
- Pure HTML/CSS/JS, no backend
- Built with Astro, hosted on Cloudflare Pages
- Uses mammoth.js for DOCX parsing
- Uses JSZip for EPUB generation

## Contact
- Site: https://converter-epub.com
